null, experience_level enum ('ENTRY','LEAD','MID','SENIOR') not null, job_type enum ('CONTRACT','FULL_TIME','INTERNSHIP','PART_TIME') not null, primary key (id)) 2026-07-11T20:44:58.542+05:30 DEBUG
